data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as begining_of_contract_tdate, sc_lon_m_contract.create_entry_id, sc_lon_m_contract.create_entry_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.create_entry_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as create_entry_tdate, sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as start_keep_tdate, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no, ( SELECT rule.loan_type_description FROM sc_lon_m_rule rule WHERE rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no ) as loan_type_description,
sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.paid_first_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type.loan_payment_type_desc, sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as memname
,nvl(( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ),0) as total_old_loan
,nvl(( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ),0) as int_old_loan
,sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve /*ให้เงินสดขึ้นก่อน*/ ,(case when sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = 'CSH' then '_A' else sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id end )as money_type_sort ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no ,decode(sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money,'TRD',pka_com_function.fp_form_depno( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no ),'') as type_pay_money_trb
FROM sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type , sc_com_m_branch ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_loan_request WHERE 1 = 2

data.name: xrSummary6.FormatString
data.value: เงินอนุมัติ {0:n2}

data.name: xrLabel22.Text
data.value: เลขที่บัญชีรับโอน

data.name: xrLabel21.Text
data.value: วันเริ่มชำระ

data.name: xrLabel18.Text
data.value: วันเริ่มสัญญา

data.name: xrLabel13.Text
data.value: วันที่จ่าย

data.name: t_header_publish_date.Text
data.value: t_header_reportid<รหัสรายงาน>

data.name: xrLabel14.Text
data.value: หนี้คงเหลือ

data.name: xrLabel11.Text
data.value: จ่ายงวดแรก

data.name: xrLabel9.Text
data.value: ชื่อ-นามสกุล

data.name: xrLabel7.Text
data.value: เลขที่สัญญา

data.name: xrSummary8.FormatString
data.value: เงินอนุมัติ {0:n2}

data.name: xrSummary17.FormatString
data.value: เงินอนุมัติ {0:n2}

data.name: xrSummary19.FormatString
data.value: รวมทั้งสิ้น {0:#,#} สัญญา
